title: Hollyone 63mm x 10yd Bronze Velvet Ribbons, 2PCS Thick Christmas Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Wide Ribbons for Crafting, Wired Ribbons for Wedding Car, Xmas Tree, Birthday Decorations
features: These beautiful velvet ribbons are delivered with a width of about 63mm/2.5'' and a length of about 10yd/9.1m on a handy spool. Here you could found a material from which you can conjure up the perfect accessory for a lovingly wrapped Christmas present, decorating wreath, table decorations or creative handicrafts.

Our thick silk ribbons are crafted with premium quality, offering a luxurious, soft texture that feels smooth to the touch. Durable and elegant, they add a refined touch to any project, ensuring both style and long-lasting use.

Wired ribbons can defy gravity and give our trees, garlands, and wreaths the festive lift they deserve. These wide wired ribbons will give your design the structure and staying power it needs, while also adding volume and plenty of textural interest.

We offer a wide range of ribbon colors, whether you prefer bold contrasts or a subtle monochrome look. For a high-contrast aesthetic, complementary colors on opposite sides of the color wheel, like green and deep red, are recommended. If you prefer a more subdued palette, try choosing colors in similar tones for a monochromatic look, such as silver paired with cool white or warm greens with festive gold.

When considering your options, you can determine the quantity and scale that are appropriate for the size of the present, car, wedding, or tree decorations, and choose a color palette that complements the overall creative decoration to add visual interest to the final design.
